title: helichrysum flagellare
intro: Helichrysum flagellare, also known as the Elf or Mountain Zieria, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils such as limonene and beta-pinene. The health benefits of Helichrysum flagellare include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum flagellare include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
